findings.title: Handle status discovery failures instead of letting the CLI crash
findings.impact: Command.run calls list_workers() directly, but list_workers() raises RuntimeError when pgrep is missing, times out, or exits with an error other than no matches. The top-level dscli main() does not catch command exceptions, so these expected operational failures terminate dscli status with an uncaught traceback instead of the command contract used by neighboring CLI commands: log the failure and return BaseCommand.FAILURE.
findings.fix: Wrap the list_workers() call in run() in a try/except, log a concise status failure message, and return BaseCommand.FAILURE on discovery errors.
